scripts.deploy: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const p='server-laravel/public';const idx=path.join(p,'index.php');if(!fs.existsSync(p))fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true});let idxBak='';try{idxBak=fs.readFileSync(idx,'utf-8')}catch(e){}fs.cpSync('dist',p,{recursive:true,force:true});if(idxBak)fs.writeFileSync(idx,idxBak);console.log('Deployed: index.php '+(idxBak?'preserved':'created (index.php not found, fresh Laravel project?)'))"
